facebook.caption: POV: you're on Trần Hưng Đạo and every restaurant looks the same. Then you spot CƠM CHAY HIỀN ĐỨC. Vegetarian food in Phu Quoc that actually makes you forget meat exists. 4.9 stars. Only 47 people know about it. Order the com chay set, find a seat, and go quiet for a minute. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walked straight past it twice. CƠM CHAY HIỀN ĐỨC on Trần Hưng Đạo is serving 4.9-star vegetarian plates that stop you mid-bite. Don't sleep on this one.

instagram.caption: POV: you almost walked past CƠM CHAY HIỀN ĐỨC. 4.9 stars. Vegetarian plates that hit hard. Don't be me. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: 4.9-star vegetarian spot on Trần Hưng Đạo. CƠM CHAY HIỀN ĐỨC is the one locals aren't loud about yet.

tiktok.caption: Almost missed this 4.9-star vegetarian spot in Phu Quoc. CƠM CHAY HIỀN ĐỨC hits different. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel
